title: One Heart One Slot
description: A Minecraft challenge with only one heart and one slot
body:
![titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/393e23c2dcdc420028817f1f20bec86ff734b2f4.png)

---

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e5d47afb1ec97eaf67b51e3922abe80f00bf06.png)](https://discord.gg/r5u6jwpHJY) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85767d619d6e19ce7285fa1798c07c196575a0ea_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/victorwinner/projects)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c39355dab93d38f00808074166bd07c6a1dad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/VictorWinner)

---

You need to survive with one half Heart and one Slot in Hardcore

---

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3711514db9a3e87d1488a9c7f874ecbf8f3cb820.png)

---



<details>
<summary>🧱 What's Included?</summary>


**🩸 Half-Heart Hardcore:**

Your max health is half a heart. No mistakes allowed.

**🎒 Realistic Inventory:** 

You only get one inventory slot. Choose wisely.

**🌳 Tree Harvester:**

Cut down entire trees with one swing — survival needs efficiency.

**🛠 Simple Menu & Custom Splash Screen:**

Clean and fast UI experience from the start.

**🌟 Iris Shaders + Sodium + Starlight:**

Beautiful visuals and optimized lighting with top-tier performance.

**⚙️ FerriteCore, Lithium, Entity Culling, LazyDFU & more:**

Deep performance tuning under the hood.

**💤 Dynamic FPS & FastQuit:**

Save system resources and speed up quitting.

**🧠 Memory Leak Fix & ImmediatelyFast:**

Keep your game smooth and stable.
</details>


<details>
<summary>🎯 Who is this for?</summary>


**This modpack is perfect for players who:**

Want a unique survival challenge,

Love minimalist, high-stakes gameplay,

Still care about performance, polish, and visual quality.

</details>



<details>
<summary>💡 Note</summary>


Built for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric). All mods are preconfigured — just install and start suffering 😄.
</details>

---
